Article Title: 'Insult to national flag': Complaint filed against Hardik Pandya over T20 WC celebration
Article Text:
Hardik Pandya Credits Girlfriend Mahieka Sharma After India’s T20 World Cup Glory

Poll What do you think is the most appropriate way to celebrate a national victory? With joyous parades and events. With respectful ceremonies.

NEW DELHI: A complaint has been filed against Indian cricketer Hardik Pandya alleging disrespect to the national flag during celebrations after India’s victory in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup. The complaint was submitted by advocate Wajid Khan Bidkar at the Shivaji Nagar police station, accusing the all-rounder of insulting the Tricolour during the team’s on-field celebrations following the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium.According to the complaint, several videos from the victory celebrations went viral on social media, showing Pandya celebrating with the national flag draped over his shoulder.The complainant alleged that during the celebrations the cricketer was seen dancing and later lying down on the stage with the flag still wrapped around him.Khan has argued that the act amounts to disrespect towards the national flag and violates provisions of the Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act, 1971.“You must have seen the T20 World Cup celebrations. Hardik Pandya was dancing with his girlfriend in celebration of his victory.The national flag was tied to his back,” Khan told ANI.“According to Section 2 of the 1971 National Flag Act, we should respect the dignity of the national flag. However, Hardik Pandya was so lost in the celebration that he was lying with his girlfriend while wearing the national flag. I believe it is an insult to the national flag,” he added.Khan said he initially faced questions from the police about jurisdiction since the incident occurred in Ahmedabad. However, he insisted that a complaint could still be filed as the national flag represents the entire country.“When I went to file the complaint, they told me the incident occurred there, not here. I told them the national flag is a symbol of the entire nation, and we can file a complaint here. They have accepted my complaint and given me a copy,” he said.A police officer at the Shivaji Nagar station confirmed that the application had been received but did not provide further details on possible action.The complaint comes after India’s dominant win over New Zealand national cricket team in the final on Sunday. India defeated New Zealand by 96 runs to successfully defend their T20 World Cup title.The victory also marked a historic milestone for India national cricket team. The team became the first side to win the T20 World Cup on home soil, the first to secure consecutive titles after their 2024 triumph, and the first nation to lift the trophy three times, having previously won in 2007 and 2024.
Article Summary: A complaint has been filed against Indian cricketer Hardik Pandya. The complaint alleges disrespect to the national flag during celebrations after India’s victory in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup. India defeated New Zealand by 96 runs to successfully defend their T20 title.

Article Title: T20 World Cup 2026 Prize Money: How Much Will The Winner, Runners-Up, and semi-finalists Earn?
Article Text:
India's Axar Patel and teammates celebrate the wicket of New Zealand's Finn Allen (ANI Photo)

Extra trains and poojas: How India is preparing for T20 World Cup final

India national cricket team not only lifted the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 trophy but also secured a massive financial reward after defeating New Zealand national cricket team in the final in Ahmedabad.The champions will take home $3 million, which translates to approximately INR 27.48 crore, from the tournament’s prize pool. The runners up, New Zealand, will receive $1.6 million, around INR 14.65 crore.The International Cricket Council allocated the prize money across all teams participating in the tournament, with the total pool amounting to roughly INR 120 crore. The distribution is based on how far each team progressed in the competition.The two losing semi finalists, South Africa national cricket team and England national cricket team , will each receive $790,000, which is about INR 7.24 crore.Teams that reached the Super 8 stage but failed to qualify for the semi finals will earn $380,000 each, approximately INR 3.48 crore. Meanwhile, every team that participated in the group stage is guaranteed a payout of $250,000, equivalent to around INR 2.29 crore.India’s triumph in the final was built on a dominant performance with both bat and ball.Sanju Samson led the charge with a blistering 89 off 46 balls, helping India post a massive 255 for five in the summit clash at the Narendra Modi Stadium.In response, New Zealand were bowled out for 159 as India sealed a comfortable victory to become T20 World Cup champions. Jasprit Bumrah starred with four wickets for 15 runs, while Axar Patel picked up three wickets to complete a dominant performance.
Article Summary: Champions will take home $3 million, which translates to approximately INR 27.48 crore, from the tournament’s prize pool. The runners up, New Zealand, will receive $1.6 million, around INR 14.65 crore. The International Cricket Council allocated the prize money across all teams participating in the tournament.

Article Title: ICC Men’s T20 World Cup Winners List (2007–2026): Full list of tournament champions and runners-up
Article Text:
Photo/Agencies

Extra trains and poojas: How India is preparing for T20 World Cup final

Here's full list of T20 World Cup winners and runners up from 2007 to 2026

Year Winner Runner Up 2007 India Pakistan 2009 Pakistan Sri Lanka 2010 England Australia 2012 West Indies Sri Lanka 2014 Sri Lanka India 2016 West Indies England 2021 Australia New Zealand 2022 England Pakistan 2024 India South Africa 2026 India New Zealand

India defended their title in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup after defeating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final in Ahmedabad on Sunday, following a record total in the first innings.India posted 255 for five after strong contributions from Sanju Samson (89), Abhishek Sharma (52) and Ishan Kishan (54). The total is the highest ever scored in a T20 World Cup final. With the win, India also became the first side to defend the T20 World Cup title.Chasing 256, New Zealand lost early wickets while trying to increase the scoring rate.Finn Allen (9) and Glenn Phillips (5) were dismissed early, leaving the side under pressure.India’s bowlers then took control. Axar Patel returned figures of 3 for 27 and Jasprit Bumrah finished with 4 for 15.After the dismissal of Tim Seifert, who scored 52 from 26 balls, the result was largely decided.Earlier, after being asked to bat first, Samson and Abhishek attacked from the start against the New Zealand bowlers.The pair added 98 runs for the first wicket in 7.1 overs, laying the platform for a high total.India crossed the 200-run mark in the 15th over.New Zealand slowed the scoring when James Neesham dismissed Samson, Kishan and captain Suryakumar Yadav (0) within six deliveries in the 16th over.Hardik Pandya made 18 before getting out, while Shivam Dube remained unbeaten on 26 and scored 24 runs in the final over bowled by Neesham.India added 52 runs in the last five overs.
Article Summary: India beat New Zealand by 96 runs in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup final. India posted a record total of 255 for five in their first innings. The total is the highest ever scored in a T20 final. New Zealand lost early wickets while trying to increase the scoring rate.

Article Title: Power awards go to... India’s best women content creators
Article Text: Celebrating the spirit of International Women’s Day, Times Entertainment’s Power Creator Awards — Women’s Edition ceremony took place in Mumbai on Monday, March 9, to honour exceptional women shaping India’s digital universe.The event kicked off with a panel discussion on the ‘She-Economy’ featuring actor Sayani Gupta, long-jump legend Anju Bobby George, poet Priya Malik and content creator Sukriti Chaturvedi.Women creators were nominated across diverse categories, including comedy, body positivity, dance, beauty, podcasts and more, reflecting the breadth of talent and influence shaping today’s digital landscape. Under each category, there were two winners: Jury Choice and Popular Choice.The Popular Choice win-ner was decided by public votes, while the Jury Choice winner was chosen by a panel comprising Divya Dutta, Anup Soni, Shweta Tripathi and Rasika Dugal. Addtionally, there were special awards given to exceptional achievers.
Article Summary: Women creators were nominated across diverse categories, including comedy, body positivity, dance, beauty, podcasts and more. The Popular Choice win-ner was decided by public votes, while the Jury Choice winner was chosen by a panel comprising Divya Dutta, Anup Soni, Shweta Tripathi and Rasika Dugal.

Article Title: “If you’re heartbroken…”: Cardi B opens up on what helped her move on as Stefon Diggs is accused of cheating on her with multiple women
Article Text:
Cardi B opens up on what helped her move on as Stefon Diggs is accused of cheating on her with multiple women.(Image via Getty Images)

Cardi B shares what helped her to heal her pain amid her break up with Stefon Diggs



Did Stefon Diggs cheat on Cardi B with multiple women when they were dating?







Stefon Diggs, the New England Patriots’ star player, has had a tough few weeks after Cardi B ended things with him.The popular wide receiver witnessed a brutal loss in Super Bowl LX and has now been released by his team after just one season. Though Cardi B has stayed silent about her feelings, her painful statements on splitting from a partner have resurfaced.A few months ago, on Instagram Live, Cardi B interacted with her fans as she spoke about how she has been able to get over her heartbreaking break ups.Cardi B said, “If you’re going through a breakup, if you’re going through some shit with your baby’s father or some sh*t, if you’ve just got a divorce, if you’re heartbroken—go outside with your f***ing friends…”The popular Grammy winner added, “When I kept going outside, people was like, ‘Oh, she got three kids.’”Cardi B continued, “F*** that. When you go outside with your friends, your friends are healing you. I really felt like my friends was healing me. There was times that I was at home by myself and I started feeling lonely and I started feeling anxiety.”Over the last few months, the “Am I the Drama?” artist has become more and more public about the pain she has gone through in her life.A few months ago, as Cardi B opened up about the betrayal she felt in her marriage to her ex husband, Offset, she had credited Stefon Diggs for “healing” her.Though fans rooted for Cardi B and Stefon Diggs’ future together as many expected the two to take the next step in their relationship, things came crashing down when she broke up with him.At this point in time, there are strong rumors about Stefon Diggs cheating on Cardi B with multiple women but nothing has been confirmed yet.This has also led Stefon Diggs to get brutally trolled as many believe allegedly cheating on Cardi B was one of the biggest mistakes of his life.However, both Stefon Diggs and Cardi B have stayed away from all the speculations as they continue to focus on their child together.For now, Cardi B is busy touring the country as she stays distant from all the rumors.
Article Summary: Cardi B opens up on what helped her move on as Stefon Diggs is accused of cheating on her with multiple women. The New England Patriots’ star player has had a tough few weeks after Cardi B ended things with him. The popular Grammy winner has become more public about the pain she has gone through.

Article Title: Travis Kelce: “I f***ing hated how that s**t ended”: Travis Kelce shares what pulled him back to Kansas City- And it’s not just Taylor Swift
Article Text:
Travis Kelce revealed the real reason behind his Chiefs return and its not just Taylor Swift(Image Source: Getty Images)

Frustration over last season pushed Travis Kelce to run it back

How Taylor Swift’s mindset also helped shape Travis Kelce’s decision







The talk around Travis Kelce 's return to the Chiefs mostly revolved around Taylor Swift . But the real story runs deeper. The star tight end never felt right about how the last season ended for the Kansas City Chiefs. That frustration stayed with him all winter.So when questions about retirement surfaced, Kelce looked at the bigger picture. Pride, unfinished work and the hunger to compete again pushed him toward another year in Kansas City. Swift played a role, but Kelce says the main reason sits much closer to the field.Travis Kelce did not hide his feelings when he spoke on the “New Heights” podcast on March 11, 2026. The veteran tight end admitted the disappointing season stayed in his head long after the final whistle.“Of course, I want to come back. I don’t want to end my career not making the playoffs and not having one of the best years,” Kelce said on the New Heights podcast. “I f***ing hated how that s**It ended last year, and I want to make it right. I want another chance at a f***ing Super Bowl.”The numbers explain the frustration. Kelce finished the 2025 season with 76 catches on 108 targets for 851 yards and five touchdowns. His average dropped to 50.1 receiving yards per game.That marked the lowest mark of his career. For a player who built a decade of dominance in Kansas City, the dip felt personal. Kelce had crossed 1,000 receiving yards in seven seasons and never posted fewer than 800 yards before. He also has stacked 11 straight Pro Bowl selections since 2015.Still, the Chiefs stumbled to a 6–11 record and missed the playoffs. That ending pushed Kelce toward one more run.Even though frustration drove Travis Kelce's return to the Chiefs, Taylor Swift also played a part. Kelce spoke about that influence during an appearance on The Pat McAfee Show. “We share the same love for what we do,” Kelce said.The star TE continued, “It’s amazing to see her keep going to the table and keep finding new things creatively. That’s motivating.”Kelce pointed to Swift’s constant drive as something that stuck with him. Watching her keep pushing in music made him reflect on his own career. That perspective mattered. Kelce knew he still had something left to prove in a Chiefs uniform. The frustration from last season lit the fire. Swift’s work ethic added another spark.Now the 36-year-old tight end enters his 14th NFL season with a clear goal. He wants one more shot with the Kansas City Chiefs and one more chance to chase a Super Bowl.
Article Summary: Travis Kelce revealed the real reason behind his Chiefs return and its not just Taylor Swift. The star tight end never felt right about how the last season ended for the Kansas City Chiefs. Pride, unfinished work and the hunger to compete again pushed him toward another year.

Article Title: Gautam Gambhir backs Arshdeep Singh after Daryl Mitchell incident in T20 World Cup final
Article Text:
Gautam Gambhir and Arshdeep Singh (Image credit: Instagram)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Gautam Gambhir reflects on India’s World Cup win and backing Sanju Samson in the tournament

Poll How do you view the impact of social media on cricket controversies? It escalates issues unnecessarily. It raises awareness about player actions.





NEW DELHI: India head coach Gautam Gambhir has strongly defended pacer Arshdeep Singh following his on-field altercation with Daryl Mitchell during the final of the 2026 ICC Men's T20 World Cup, saying he would have been “absolutely fine” even if the bowler had not apologised after the incident.The flashpoint occurred in the 11th over of New Zealand’s innings at the final in Ahmedabad. After Mitchell smashed Arshdeep for two consecutive sixes, the Indian pacer fielded the ball on his follow-through and threw it back towards the batter, with the ball striking Mitchell on the pads.Although Arshdeep apologised to the New Zealand vice-captain after the match, the International Cricket Council later fined the pacer 15 per cent of his match fee for a Level 1 breach of the ICC Code of Conduct.One demerit point was also added to his disciplinary record.Arshdeep was found guilty of breaching Article 2.9 of the ICC Code of Conduct, which relates to throwing a ball at or near a player in an inappropriate or dangerous manner during an international match. The charge was levelled by on-field umpires Richard Illingworth and Alex Wharf, along with third umpire Allahuddien Paleker and fourth umpire Adrian Holdstock.Match referee Andy Pycroft imposed the sanction, which Arshdeep accepted, eliminating the need for a formal hearing.However, Gambhir played down the controversy and insisted the bowler’s reaction was a natural expression of competitive spirit.“That is okay. You're representing your country. You're bound to show aggression. There's nothing wrong with that. No bowler likes to get hit for two sixes. And that is the kind of response I want to see from my players. And that there is nothing wrong. Or in fact, even if sorry is not said, I was absolutely fine with it. I was absolutely fine. He doesn't need to say sorry. Yes, it's good on him that he apologised. But on a cricket field, there are no friends. Neither are there any enemies,” Gambhir said in an interview to ANI.He also suggested that such moments are often exaggerated in the modern era due to social media scrutiny.“Your job is to represent your country. Your job is to win a game of cricket for your country. And you don't want to get hit for two sixes. And that was fine. I thought we should not blow all these things out of proportion because these things used to happen before. Today, because of social media, things escalate a lot,” he added.The incident came in a match that ultimately ended in historic fashion for India, as the hosts crushed New Zealand by 96 runs to lift their third T20 World Cup title — becoming the first side to defend the trophy and win it on home soil.
Article Summary: India head coach Gautam Gambhir defends bowler Arshdeep Singh following on-field altercation with Daryl Mitchell. Incident occurred in the 11th over of New Zealand’s innings at the final in Ahmedabad. After Mitchell smashed two consecutive sixes, the Indian pacer fielded the ball on his follow-through and threw it back towards the batter.

Article Title: Mohammad Rizwan: Mohammad Rizwan's 'I don't watch India's matches' remark resurfaces after Bangladesh humiliation
Article Text:
Mohammad Rizwan and Team India

Gautam Gambhir reflects on India’s World Cup win and backing Sanju Samson in the tournament

Poll Who do you believe was the standout performer in the ODI match between Bangladesh and Pakistan? Nahid Rana Tanzid Hasan





NEW DELHI: Pakistan captain Mohammad Rizwan has come under the spotlight after his earlier remark about not watching India’s matches resurfaced following Pakistan’s heavy defeat to Bangladesh in the first ODI on Wednesday.During a casual conversation with a reporter at a nets session earlier, Rizwan was asked about India’s impressive performance in the T20 World Cup semi-final against England, where they posted a total of more than 250 runs.Responding to the question, Rizwan had said, "Sorry, I don't watch their matches."The comment gained renewed attention after Pakistan suffered a crushing loss to Bangladesh in the opening ODI of the three-match series.Rizwan himself struggled during the match, scoring just 10 runs off 20 balls, as Pakistan’s batting line-up collapsed under pressure.Batting first in Mirpur, Pakistan were bowled out for just 114 runs in 30.4 overs, marking their lowest ODI total against Bangladesh.The collapse came after a steady start, with the visitors losing wickets in quick succession once the first breakthrough arrived.Young Bangladeshi pacer Nahid Rana was the star of the show, producing a brilliant spell to dismantle Pakistan’s top order.The 23-year-old returned figures of 5 for 24, claiming his first five-wicket haul in ODIs. Rana removed Sahibzada Farhan, Shamyl Hussain, Maaz Sadaqat, Rizwan and Salman Agha, leaving Pakistan reeling at 69-5.Captain Mehidy Hasan Miraz also played a key role with the ball, taking three wickets, while Taskin Ahmed and Mustafizur Rahman chipped in with one wicket each. Only Faheem Ashraf, who scored 37, offered some resistance for Pakistan late in the innings.Bangladesh then made light work of the modest target, chasing down 115 in just 15.1 overs to seal an emphatic eight-wicket victory and take a 1-0 lead in the series.Opener Tanzid Hasan led the charge with an unbeaten 67 off 42 balls, sharing an 82-run partnership with Najmul Hossain Shanto (27) to complete a comprehensive win for the hosts.
Article Summary: Pakistan captain Mohammad Rizwan has come under the spotlight after his earlier remark about not watching India’s matches resurfaced. The comment gained renewed attention after Pakistan suffered a crushing loss to Bangladesh in the opening ODI of the three-match series. Batting first in Mirpur, Pakistan were bowled out for just 114 runs in 30.4 overs.

Article Title: Charulatha Remesh Sanju Samson’s wife sweet gesture with his Player of the Tournament trophy melts fans’ hearts
Article Text:
Sanju Samson with wife Charulatha Remesh

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Sanju Samson opens up on T20 World Cup journey, and title win





NEW DELHI: A touching off-field moment involving Sanju Samson ’s wife Charulatha Remesh has captured the internet’s attention days after India’s triumph at the 2026 ICC Men's T20 World Cup.A video showing Charulatha carefully wrapping Samson’s Player of the Tournament trophy with a T-shirt to protect it from scratches has gone viral on social media, winning the hearts of fans across platforms.The clip, recorded shortly after the award ceremony, shows Charulatha holding the prestigious trophy and admiring it closely. Standing beside her was Devisha Shetty, the wife of India captain Suryakumar Yadav . After exchanging a few words, Charulatha quickly wrapped the trophy in a T-shirt, seemingly to ensure it remained safe from damage while being carried around amid the celebrations.The small but thoughtful gesture resonated deeply with fans.The viral video surfaced soon after Samson shared a heartfelt tribute to his wife on Instagram following India’s historic title win. Thanking Charulatha for her unwavering support, the star batter opened up about how she stood by him through every phase of his career.“Right from the day I met you till this day of my life... Thank you so very much for being by my side, loving me for who I am, and being absolutely true and honest to me, no matter what I was to the outside world.You have seen my best side and my worst side, yet you stood strong by me,” Samson wrote.“Thank you for understanding how important cricket is in my life and making it just as important in yours,” he added.“And you have wished and dreamed with the same passion and intensity as I did for this moment. Thank you so very much, my dear Pondattiiiiii.”The emotional tribute came after a remarkable turnaround tournament for Samson. Initially relegated to the bench and playing just one league match against Namibia in New Delhi, the wicketkeeper-batter was drafted back into the XI during the Super Eights clash against Zimbabwe.From there, Samson scripted one of the tournament’s most dramatic comebacks. An unbeaten 97 against West Indies in Kolkata set the tone before he delivered back-to-back 89s in the semi-final against England and the final against New Zealand.By the end of the tournament, Samson had amassed 321 runs in five innings at a strike rate of 199, earning the Player of the Tournament award and playing a central role in India lifting their third T20 World Cup title.
Article Summary: Charulatha Remesh wraps Sanju Samson's Player of the Tournament trophy with a T-shirt to protect it from scratches. Video goes viral on social media, winning the hearts of fans across platforms. Samson paid tribute to his wife on Instagram following India’s historic title win.

Article Title: Jitesh Sharma reveals painful journey after World Cup snub and father's death
Article Text:
Image credit: BCCI/IPL

Gautam Gambhir reflects on India’s World Cup win and backing Sanju Samson in the tournament

Poll Should teams consider more than one wicketkeeper in the playing XI? Yes, it can enhance team flexibility No, it complicates team dynamics





NEW DELHI: Jitesh Sharma admits that being left out of India’s ICC Men's T20 World Cup squad was disappointing, but that setback soon felt insignificant compared to the personal loss he suffered shortly after. The wicketkeeper-batter lost his father, Mohan Sharma, on February 1 after a brief illness, a moment that changed his perspective on everything."When I got the news of my non-selection, I was a little bit disheartened. I am also a human. I can feel sad and bad. But later on, as time went by, the sad time becomes short," Jitesh told PTI during an exclusive interview.The disappointment of missing the global tournament soon gave way to a far deeper emotional challenge."But later on, my dad got ill. And he passed away on 1st of Feb. So, I was with him for seven days. Afterward, I got to know that my dad needed me more than the World Cup. After that, I didn't have any sad feeling, any regret or anything for anyone or for myself also. I am not angry or anything," he said, with the sadness evident in his voice."I was grateful that God gave me the opportunity to stay with my dad for seven days. So, I was able to take care of him.And I enjoyed watching the World Cup on TV at home. It's a very different feeling. It gives you lots of pressure rather than playing. And I was very happy for the boys."With his father gone, the responsibility of being the eldest son has become a defining part of his life."I can't forget that thing and I don't want to forget that thing because he is not there anymore. When you lose your dad, after a few days you get to know that you are now responsible for taking decisions in your family as the elder son."And that's it - to take care of your mother, brother and family. So, I'm someone who can't show my feelings to them and can't be weak in front of them because they are looking at me while playing cricket also. And I have to accept it," Jitesh said while reflecting on how life sometimes delivers its toughest challenges.Grief, he admits, does not arrive all at once but settles in gradually, leaving behind a permanent void."It hits after some time. I'm not coping with anything. I'm just accepting that my dad is not there anymore. There is a portion of my heart that is empty now. It will be empty till my death because of my dad."Cricket, however, has also taught him resilience, helping him move forward despite the pain."And I have learned to carry myself with that sorrow and that hollowness during practice. Because no matter how much I want, I can't forget that thing. Because it's your father, right? He is my hero for my life.""If he was alive today, he would have told me to go and practice. Don't worry about me. So I always bring this thing to my mind that if I'm in sorrow or pain, what he would have told me? I think he would have suggested me to go and play the game. And I'm very proud of it."Jitesh also drew parallels with his India teammate Rinku Singh, saying he understands the emotional strength required to return to the field after personal setbacks."That's the same thing Rinku must have felt. That's why he was able to come on the ground again. And it's a very big thing."‘Why can’t three keepers play together?’On the cricketing front, Jitesh remains pragmatic about team combinations. With wicketkeeper-batters like Sanju Samson and Ishan Kishan also in contention, he said he would be happy to adapt to any role if it helps the team."I think of it from a different perspective. I take it from a different perspective -- that by doing my own work, why not two keepers be in the playing XI and the third play as a finisher? Exactly, that can also happen. Why not?"Learning from Virat Kohli Jitesh also spoke about the inspiration he draws from watching Virat Kohli up close at Royal Challengers Bengaluru, admitting that matching the former India captain’s intensity is not easy."Just observing small things, you can learn a lot. And it can be a life-turning decision or life-turning observation. Because the way he prepares, starts his day, not just practice, I think it's very impressive. Still, I'm 32 and I can't match his energy."
Article Summary: Jitesh Sharma was left out of India's T20 World Cup squad. The wicketkeeper- batter lost his father, Mohan Sharma, on February 1. Jitesh draws inspiration from watching Virat Kohli up close at Royal Challengers.

Article Title: Imad Wasim: Imad Wasim slams critics downplaying T20 World Cup triumph: 'India bigger than Pakistan'
Article Text:
Imad Wasim, Gautam Gambhir, and Suryakumar Yadav

Ishan Kishan responds to Kirti Azad's criticism | T20 World Cup

Poll What do you think was the key factor behind India's victory in the T20 World Cup 2026? Strong team performance Favorable pitches





Pakistan all-rounder Imad Wasim praised India’s performance after their T20 World Cup 2026 triumph, saying the team proved its dominance despite criticism about pitches or alleged advantages.India successfully defended their title by defeating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad, continuing their strong run in global tournaments.Some critics had earlier suggested that conditions favoured India during the tournament, but Wasim dismissed those claims and said the pitches were fair for all teams.According to him, there were even moments when the conditions did not favour India, yet they still performed strongly throughout the competition."We always hear people saying that umpires favour India or that they prepare spin-friendly pitches, but you have to agree that in this tournament, the pitches were very well balanced. Sometimes, the conditions were even against India, but they still managed to deliver a dominating performance," Imad said on a Pakistani TV show.Wasim added that instead of questioning India’s success, other teams should acknowledge how well they played.He said their consistent results show how strong they currently are in international cricket."So, we should not always nitpick or claim that India are looking for an escape route. As a cricketing nation, we have to praise them for their performance and accept the fact that in terms of cricket, they are bigger than us (Pakistan) and many other teams," he added.India’s victory also made history as they became the first men’s team to retain the T20 World Cup title.The Suryakumar Yadav-led side also became the first host nation to win the tournament and the first team to lift the trophy three times.
Article Summary: Pakistan all-rounder Imad Wasim praised India’s performance after their T20 World Cup 2026 triumph. He said the team proved its dominance despite criticism about pitches or alleged advantages. India successfully defended their title by defeating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final.

Mumbai Indians Players (BCCI/IPL Photo)

Mumbai Indians (MI) will kick off their IPL 2026 campaign with a home match against Kolkata Knight Riders on March 29 at Mumbai. MI is the one most successful team in IPL history, having won the title five times—in 2013, 2015, 2017, 2019, and 2020.The BCCI has released the schedule for the first phase of IPL 2026, which will run from 28th March to 12th April 2026. Since three states will have Assembly elections during this period, the full tournament schedule will be announced once the election dates are confirmed.Also See: IPL 2026 full schedule A total of 20 matches will be played across 10 cities: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Guwahati, New Chandigarh, Lucknow, Kolkata, Chennai, Delhi, Ahmedabad, and Hyderabad.Mumbai Indians are always among the top contenders, and fans will be eager to see if they can continue their winning legacy this season.
Article Summary: IPL 2026 will run from 28th March to 12th April 2026. 20 matches will be played across 10 cities: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Guwahati, New Chandigarh, Lucknow, Kolkata, Chennai, Delhi, Ahmedabad, and Hyderabad. Article Title: Meet Akshay Bhatia’s wife Presleigh Schultz: Influencer who once caddied for him and now stands beside golfer’s $3 million net worth success
Article Text:
Meet Akshay Bhatia’s wife Presleigh Schultz: Influencer who once caddied for him and now stands beside golfer’s $3 million net worth success (Image via Getty)

How Presleigh Schultz supported Akshay Bhatia’s golf journey from being his caddie to becoming his wife

What is Akshay Bhatia’s net worth in 2026?





Akshay Bhatia is becoming one of the young names people notice on the PGA Tour. But when fans watch him win big tournaments, there is one person who is almost always nearby cheering him on, his wife, Presleigh Schultz. Presleigh Schultz has been part of Akshay Bhatia’s journey for years. She stood beside him when he won his first PGA Tour title at the Barracuda Championship in 2023. She was also there in 2024 when he defeated Denny McCarthy in a playoff at the Valero Texas Open.Their story started with a simple Instagram message. At that time, Presleigh Schultz did not even know much about golf. But over time she became one of the biggest parts of Akshay Bhatia’s life and career.From once carrying his golf bag to now traveling with him every week, her support has stayed constant as his career keeps growing.Akshay Bhatia first connected with Presleigh Schultz before the 2021 Valero Texas Open. He sent her a message on Instagram asking her out. That message started a relationship that soon became very serious.During the early part of their relationship, Presleigh even worked as Bhatia’s caddie for a short time.She once admitted she “knew nothing about golf” when they met. Still, she walked the course with him and helped him during tournaments.One of those moments came in January 2022 when Bhatia won his first event on the Korn Ferry Tour at the Bahamas Great Exuma Classic. Schultz was on the bag that week and supported him through the win.Later, Akshay Bhatia began working with professional caddie Joe Greiner. Even after stepping away from caddie duties, Schultz continued traveling with him to tournaments and walking every round to support him.After Bhatia won the Barracuda Championship in 2023, he spoke openly about how much Presleigh means to him. He said:“I couldn’t imagine my life without her and being on this journey without her. She has done a lot for me. She makes my peanut and jelly sandwiches every morning and does a lot.”He also added:“She has seen me cry in the hotel room and seen me super happy. She always keeps telling me how good I am, even if I question myself sometimes.”In September 2023, Akshay Bhatia proposed to Schultz in Napa Valley at a vineyard. The couple later got married in December 2025 at The Abaco Club. Their wedding was a three-day celebration, and Schultz’s uncle officiated the ceremony on December 13.Their first dance as husband and wife was to “Devotion” by Justin Bieber.Presleigh Schultz was born on February 13, 2002, just days after Bhatia’s birthday on January 31, 2002. She works as an influencer and earns through brand endorsements. She has more than 43,000 followers on Instagram but still keeps most of her life private.Before meeting Bhatia, she lived in Texas. Today, the couple lives in California and also share two dogs together.Even though she no longer carries the golf bag, Presleigh Schultz remains one of the most important people behind Akshay Bhatia’s growing golf career.Akshay Bhatia’s success on the PGA Tour has also helped him build strong earnings at a young age. Akshay Bhatia’s estimated net worth is around $3 million. Most of his income comes from PGA Tour prize money, sponsorship deals, and endorsements.His wife Presleigh Schultz brings income to their household through her work as an influencer who partners with brands and promotes products on social media platforms. The couple maintains financial secrecy but their professional development in sports and digital media will result in higher net worth for them in future years.
Article Summary: Akshay Bhatia’s estimated net worth is around $3 million. Most of his income comes from PGA Tour prize money, sponsorship deals, and endorsements. His wife Presleigh Schultz brings income to their household through her work as an influencer.

Article Title: Bill Belichick And Jordon Hudson: “Actually the ‘daughter of Maine fishermen’: Bill Belichick’s girlfriend Jordon Hudson turns heads in a rope dress while advocating for Maine fishermen and ocean reco
Article Text:
Bill Belichick’s girlfriend Jordon Hudson turns heads in rope dress while advocating for Maine fishermen and ocean recovery (Getty Images)

Bill Belichick's girlfriend, Jordon Hudson, uses a rope dress to spotlight Maine fishermen and ocean conservation







Former Patriots head coach Bill Belichick’s girlfriend, Jordon Hudson, grabbed attention online this week, but not for the usual reasons tied to their high-profile relationship. The 24-year-old stepped out in a dress made entirely from recovered rope pulled from the ocean. The striking look quickly went viral after NFL insider Dov Kleiman highlighted the moment on social media.The outfit carried a deeper message. Hudson used the unusual design to draw attention to environmental damage in the ocean and the struggles of fishing communities in Maine. Her move also sparked a wave of reactions online, especially from people who know her family history.The viral moment began when Dov Kleiman posted online about Jordon Hudson’s look. In the caption, he wrote that Hudson wore a dress made of rope to raise awareness about environmental issues. According to the post, the piece was created from 36 pounds of rope recovered from the ocean, turning marine waste into a powerful statement.Soon after, social media users began connecting the message to Hudson’s personal background.One widely shared comment summed up the sentiment around her appearance. “Say what you want about the Belichick relationship, but Jordon Hudson actually being the ‘Daughter of Maine Fishermen’ and fighting for their sea grant funding while wearing recovered rope is real advocacy.”That line resonated because Hudson has spoken publicly about her connection to the fishing industry. She grew up in Maine in a family deeply tied to the trade. Generations of fishermen shaped her childhood, and she spent much of her early life around boats and processing centres run by her family.Hudson once described her upbringing in an Instagram post in April 2025, writing that she was “practically born on the waters of Hancock Point, Maine,” just like her father and several generations before him. Her father worked as a commercial fisherman, and the family also operated a fishing business when she was younger.However, the business eventually closed after regulatory changes hit the local fishing industry. Hudson has since used her social media platforms to highlight the challenges faced by fishing families and the shrinking future of Maine’s traditional fisheries.That background explains why the rope dress carried meaning beyond fashion. The material itself came from the ocean, the same environment that supports the fishermen she often advocates for.Jordon Hudson and Bill Belichick have been dating since early 2023, with their relationship becoming public in June 2024. The former New England Patriots head coach, now 73, has often stayed quiet about the attention surrounding their age gap. Yet moments like this show Hudson carving out her own identity.And this time, the message had nothing to do with football. Instead, it pointed straight toward the sea and the families who still depend on it.
Article Summary: Bill Belichick’s girlfriend, Jordon Hudson, grabbed attention online this week. The 24-year-old stepped out in a dress made entirely from recovered rope pulled from the ocean. The striking look quickly went viral after NFL insider Dov Kleiman highlighted the moment. Hudson used the unusual design to draw attention to environmental damage in the ocean and the struggles of fishing communities in Maine.

Article Title: Cristiano Ronaldo reportedly asks Al Nassr to chase Bruno Fernandes as Manchester United transfer rumors intensify
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo and Bruno Fernandes (Image Via Getty)

Cristiano Ronaldo reportedly wants Bruno Fernandes to join him at Al Nassr as Manchester United captain’s future draws attention





Portuguese star Cristiano Ronaldo may soon reunite with a familiar teammate if recent transfer talk turns into reality. Reports say the Al Nassr forward has asked his club to try signing Bruno Fernandes from Manchester United during the upcoming summer transfer window. The two players have shared the field many times for both club and country, and Ronaldo reportedly believes Fernandes could strengthen the Saudi side.Right now, Fernandes is still the captain at Manchester United. However, questions about his future have been circulating since last summer. Several clubs from Saudi Arabia showed interest in him before, but he chose to remain at Old Trafford. According to 365Scores, via NFC World, Al Nassr are now among the teams closely watching his situation ahead of the next transfer window.Cristiano Ronaldo and Bruno Fernandes know each other’s game very well. When they both played for Manchester United, they appeared together in 51 matches, combining for three goals. Their partnership has been stronger for the Portuguese national team, where they have played 67 matches together and combined for six goals.Because of that connection, Ronaldo reportedly believes Fernandes would fit naturally into Al Nassr’s squad.The Saudi club already has several well known international players, and bringing in Fernandes would add creativity in midfield.Fernandes’ contract with Manchester United currently runs until 2027. Still, transfer talk continues because clubs could try to sign him for a large fee this summer rather than wait until later in his contract.Al Nassr may not be the only team interested. Reports also say Al Hilal, another major Saudi club, could compete for his signature.Last year, Fernandes openly spoke about the possibility of leaving Manchester United. In an interview with Canal 11 in December, he explained that he had chances to move but chose to stay.He said, “I could have left like many people do and said: ‘I want to leave, I don’t want to train, I just want to leave for €20m or €30m, so they pay me more on the other side.’ But I never did that. I never felt in a position to do that, because I felt that the empathy and affection I had for the club were the same.” Fernandes also admitted that some moments around the situation were difficult for him.He said, “From the club’s side, I felt a bit like, ‘if you leave, it’s not so bad for us.’ It hurts me a lot. More than hurting, it makes me sad because I’m a player they have nothing to criticise about. I’m always available, I always play, good or bad. I give my all.”Since joining Manchester United from Sporting CP in January 2020, Fernandes has been one of the club’s most productive players. He has recorded 105 goals and 101 assists in 318 matches across competitions.For now, he remains Manchester United’s captain. But with another transfer window approaching and interest growing from Saudi clubs, the story around his future may continue to develop.
Article Summary: Cristiano Ronaldo reportedly wants Bruno Fernandes to join him at Al Nassr. The two players have shared the field many times for both club and country. Ronaldo reportedly believes Fernandes could strengthen the Saudi side. Fernandes' contract with Manchester United currently runs until 2027.

Article Title: Paul Skenes: Paul Skenes receives sweet support from Olivia Dunne in Team USA colors during World Baseball Classic game
Article Text:
Paul Skenes receives sweet support from Olivia Dunne in Team USA colors during World Baseball Classic game (Image via Getty Images)

Olivia Dunne supports Paul Skenes at World Baseball Classic while Team USA beats Great Britain

Olivia Dunne's Instagram stories (Image Via Instagram/@livvydunne)





Paul Skenes had strong support during Team USA’s World Baseball Classic game in Houston, even though he was not on the field that night. His girlfriend, Olivia Dunne, was in the stadium cheering for him and the American team. The LSU gymnast and social media star caught attention with a special outfit that quietly paid tribute to the Pittsburgh Pirates pitcher. Olivia Dunne shared photos of her outfit on Instagram.She wore a white off shoulder top with “US” written in red, white, and blue on the front. On the back of the top, the name “Skenes” was stitched, showing her support for the Team USA pitcher. Later in the game, the stadium screen showed highlights from Skenes’ impressive season, which included his National League Cy Young award winning campaign.Dunne shared that moment online as well. While she supported him from the stands, Team USA delivered a strong win against Great Britain.Olivia Dunne spent the evening at Daikin Park in Houston supporting Team USA and her boyfriend, Paul Skenes. Even though Skenes did not pitch in that particular game, his presence was still felt during the broadcast and around the stadium.Dunne shared pictures of her outfit on Instagram stories before the game.She wore a white off-the-shoulder tube top with the letters “US” designed in the colors of the American flag. On the back of the top, the name “Skenes” was stitched. She paired the look with denim jeans and black kitten heels.Later, she posted a short clip showing the stadium jumbotron. The screen played highlights from Skenes’ incredible season that earned him the National League Cy Young award. Dunne watched the moment from the stands with friends, including Ali Martin, the wife of Cincinnati Reds pitcher Kyle Nicolas.While the support from the stands was strong, Team USA also delivered a strong performance on the field. The American team defeated Great Britain 9-1. However, the game did not start perfectly for Team USA. Great Britain’s leadoff hitter, Nate Eaton hit a solo home run against starting pitcher Tarik Skubal.Things quickly changed in the fifth inning. Team USA scored five runs in that inning and took control of the game. Kyle Schwarber and Gunnar Henderson each drove in two runs to help the team pull ahead. Later in the game, Alex Bregman and Will Smith added three more runs with sacrifice flies. Team captain Aaron Judge also contributed with an RBI single. Pitcher Clay Holmes earned the win on the mound.Meanwhile, Olivia Dunne also shared another tribute to Paul Skenes on TikTok. In the video, she showed Skenes wearing the Team USA uniform during their exhibition game against the San Francisco Giants earlier in the week. She used the song “Free Bird” by Lynyrd Skynyrd, along with the 2024 MOONLIGHT remix, as the background for the video.For Paul Skenes, representing the United States in the World Baseball Classic means a lot. The Pittsburgh Pirates pitcher has previously said that playing for his country is a huge honor. Skenes is expected to start for Team USA in their upcoming game against Mexico. The strong win over Great Britain gives the American team momentum before that important matchup
Article Summary: Olivia Dunne wore a white off-the-shoulder top with the letters “US” designed in the colors of the American flag. On the back of the top, the name “Skenes” was stitched, showing her support for the Team USA pitcher. While she supported him from the stands, Team USA delivered a strong win against Great Britain.

Article Title: Andre Agassi’s bold 1990s tennis fashion returns in viral Instagram video and daughter Jaz Elle Agassi teases his iconic drip
Article Text:
Andre Agassi’s bold 1990s tennis fashion returns in viral Instagram video and daughter Jaz Elle Agassi teases his iconic drip (Image via Getty)

Andre Agassi once recalled his bold 1990 French Open outfit and the tension it created with Philippe Chatrier





Andre Agassi shared a fun memory from his playing days and it quickly turned into a sweet father-daughter moment online. The former World No. 1 tennis star posted a video on Instagram on March 10 showing how he looked during the 1990s, the decade when he became one of the biggest names in tennis. The clip began with Andre Agassi today at age 55. A moment later, the video switched to old photos of him from the 1990s. Fans saw his famous long hair, bright outfits, and bold on-court style that made him stand out everywhere he played. The song Iris by the Goo Goo Dolls played in the background.Andre Agassi kept the caption simple and wrote, “What a time…”Soon after, someone very close to him joined the conversation. His daughter Jaz Elle Agassi, whom he shares with tennis legend Steffi Graf, left a playful comment under the post.Looking at her father’s bold outfits from the past, she joked and wrote, “Drippy brother.”The comment quickly caught attention because Andre Agassi’s fashion was almost as famous as his tennis. In the late 1980s and throughout the 1990s, he was known for wearing bright colors, denim shorts, headbands, and flashy tennis shoes. His style helped bring a fresh and rebellious energy to the sport at the time. Today, many fans still remember Andre Agassi not only for winning matches but also for changing how tennis players looked and expressed themselves on the court.Andre Agassi has spoken before about some of the outfits he wore during his career. In a video shared on his Instagram last year, he talked about three of his favorite looks from his playing days. One outfit that stood out came from the French Open in 1990.During that tournament, Andre Agassi walked onto the court wearing a pink-print shirt, black denim shorts, pink tights, a headband, and Nike Air Tech Challenge 2 shoes. The bold look drew a lot of attention. Some fans loved it, but others in tennis leadership were not impressed.At the time, Philippe Chatrier, who was president of the International Tennis Federation, was reportedly thinking about introducing a dress code. Andre Agassi later explained how he reacted when he heard about that idea.He said,“At the time, (Chatrier) was thinking about bringing in a dress code. So I did what any noble person would do and I called him a bozo in the press conference. That was a little bit regrettable, but it was an honest reaction to someone telling me what I had to wear.”Despite moments like that, Andre Agassi built one of the most successful careers in tennis history. He won eight Grand Slam singles titles and finished with 60 career singles trophies.Andre Agassi finally stepped away from professional tennis at the US Open in 2006. His final match came in the third round, where he lost to Benjamin Becker in New York.Even years after retirement, moments like his recent Instagram post show how fans still enjoy looking back at the personality, style, and memories that made Andre Agassi one of tennis’ most unforgettable stars.
Article Summary: Andre Agassi posted a video on Instagram showing how he looked during the 1990s. His daughter Jaz Elle Agassi left a playful comment under the post. The comment quickly caught attention because Andre Agassi’s fashion was almost as famous as his tennis.

.”

other

too right





If you’ve been on social media today, you’ve likely seen the tweet heard ‘round the world. Former NFL quarterback and current media personality Robert Griffin III (RG3) posted a simple, five-word truth bomb that has the entire football world nodding in agreement:But this isn't just RG3 being the voice of majority, it’s a direct response to a week of absolute psychological warfare conducted by the Baltimore front office. Here is why the Ravens are officially the league’s "Final Boss" of 2026.The tweet sparked a range of reactions amongst fans, some agreeing while others denying the claim but it did what it was supposed to do - Ragebait.The primary catalyst for RG3's tweet was the absolute chaos surrounding the Maxx Crosby trade. Earlier this week, it was widely reported that Baltimore had landed the Raiders' superstar pass-rusher for two first-round picks.Fans were buying jerseys, Crosby even posted an emotional goodbye to Vegas.Then came the "Ravens rug-pull." At the eleventh hour, Baltimore backed out of the deal, citing a medical concern with Crosby. This didn't just hurt the Raiders, it froze the entire NFL market. Other teams stopped bidding on defensive stars because they thought the "big fish" was gone. By the time Baltimore backed out, several GMs realized they had missed their window on other players.How did Baltimore follow up on the failed trade? By immediately signing thebest pass-rusher available, Trey Hendrickson, to a massive four-year, $112 million deal. In a span of 24 hours, they managed to break the Raiders' hearts, annoy every other GM in the league, and still walk away with an All-Pro to pair with Lamar Jackson As RG3 often points out, the "hate" also stems from how the Ravens "game the system." While teams like the Cowboys and Patriots are stressing over the salary cap, Baltimore just got awarded four compensatory draft picks, the most in the league. They have turned the art of letting players walk and replacing them with cheap, elite talent into a science.Between pairing Lamar Jackson with a freshly extended Derrick Henry and their cutthroat business tactics, the Ravens have embraced the villain role. As RG3’s viral post suggests, the rest of the league doesn't hate them because they’re doing something wrong, they hate them because they’re doing everything

Article Title: Chloe Kim And Myles Garrett Relationship Story: The cute story behind how Chloe Kim and Myles Garrett first met is straight out of a rom-com
Article Text:
Myles Garrett, Chloe Kim. (Getty Images)

How Chloe Kim Confused Myles Garrett for Martin Garrix Before Their Anime-Fueled Romance



Snowboarder Chloe Kim on Winning Silver at the Olympics in Italy & Fake Myles Garrett Engagement Pic

Jimmy Kimmel Live!

was

In the world of celebrity power couples, you usually get the classic "met at a Met Gala" or "slid into the DMs" story. But for Olympic snowboarding icon Chloe Kim and NFL wrecking ball Myles Garrett, the origin story is a comedy of errors that belongs in a sitcom.It all started in late 2024, thanks to a very busy physical therapist they both happened to share.The therapist, playing matchmaker, invited Chloe to a game between the Cleveland Browns and the Los Angeles Rams. He told her his star client, Myles Garrett, was playing and he’d love for her to come out and support.There was just one problem, Chloe Kim didn’t know a touchdown from a fast break, and she certainly didn't know who Myles Garrett was.In her head, the name registered as Martin Garrix, the world-famous EDM DJ.Chloe showed up to the stadium expecting a rave, not a pass rush. She spent the first half of the game scanned the sidelines, wondering why the "DJ" wasn't behind a turntable. She even admitted later onthat she was accidentally cheering for the Rams because she had no idea which team her supposed "date" was actually on.As halftime approached, Chloe started getting annoyed.she joked. She spent the entire third quarter waiting for a beat drop that never came. It wasn't until her friend gently explained that the 6'4", 270-pound giant crushing quarterbacks on the fieldthe man she was there to see and definitely not a Dutch DJ that the lightbulb finally went on.Despite the rocky, confused start, the two eventually connected over something far away from the football field or the halfpipe: Anime.While their sports worlds couldn't be more different, they discovered a shared obsession with shows like. They kept things low-key for months until May 2025, when they finally "hard launched" their relationship in the most "them" way possible, walking the red carpet together at the Crunchyroll Anime Awards in Tokyo.From mistaking an All-Pro defensive end for a DJ to becoming the most supportive duo in sports, Chloe and Myles proved that sometimes the best relationships start with a total lack of scouting. Today, you’re just as likely to see Myles wearing a custom jacket with Chloe’s face on it as you are to see them courtside in LA, laughing about the time she thought he was supposed to be playing techno.
Article Summary: Olympic snowboarder Chloe Kim and NFL wrecking ball Myles Garrett started their relationship with a comedy of errors. Chloe thought Garrett was Martin Garrix, the world-famous EDM DJ. The two eventually connected over something far away from the football field or the halfpipe: Anime.

Article Title: Iran women soccer asylum drama deepens as leaked hiding location forces Australia to secretly move defecting players overnight
Article Text:
Iran women soccer asylum drama deepens as leaked hiding location forces Australia to secretly move defecting players overnight (Image via Getty)

Fatemeh Pasandideh, Zahra Ghanbari, Zahra Sarbali, Atefeh Ramazanzadeh, and Mona Hamoudi granted asylum as Mohaddeseh Zolfi situation sparks security move





Mohaddeseh Zolfi and several of her teammates from Iran’s women’s soccer team suddenly had to move to a new safe place in Australia after a serious security scare. Australian officials say the team’s hiding location was accidentally exposed when a member of the Iranian delegation contacted Iran’s embassy in Sydney after first agreeing to seek asylum. The situation became urgent very quickly. According to Australia’s Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke, authorities moved the players immediately after learning that the embassy had discovered where the defecting athletes were staying. He shared this update while speaking in parliament on Wednesday.The players had already been under pressure after a bold moment earlier this month. During an Asian Cup match on the Gold Coast, members of Iran’s team refused to sing their national anthem.Iranian state television later called them “wartime traitors,” which raised serious fears about what might happen to them if they returned home. Because of those risks, Australia offered asylum to members of the team. Several players accepted the offer and chose to stay rather than fly back to Iran with the rest of the squad.The story took another turn when two members of the Iranian delegation first agreed to remain in Australia.One of them was 21 year old striker Mohaddeseh Zolfi. The other was support staff member Zahra Soltan Moshkehkar.But according to Tony Burke, one of the two later changed her mind and contacted the Iranian embassy in Sydney asking to be picked up. Burke did not publicly say which of the two made the call.That single phone call created a major concern. Officials feared that the Iranian authorities now knew where the defecting players were staying.Burke told parliament that once this information reached the Australian government, they acted right away.“I immediately gave the instruction for people to be moved, and that’s been dealt with immediately,” Burke said during the parliamentary session.Australian officials then quickly moved the players to a different secure location to make sure they remained safe.Burke also made it clear that the woman who decided to return to Iran was not forced to stay in Australia. He said the government gave her every chance to remain.“This was her decision, and every question you would want asked, was asked,” Burke explained.Five players have now officially accepted Australia’s asylum offer. Those players are Fatemeh Pasandideh, Zahra Ghanbari, Zahra Sarbali, Atefeh Ramazanzadeh, and Mona Hamoudi.According to Burke, the athletes want people to understand something important about their decision.“They want to be clear they are not political activists. They are athletes who want to be safe,” he said.Australia’s Prime Minister Anthony Albanese also spoke about the players earlier this week. He praised their courage and assured them they would be protected.“They’re safe here and they should feel at home here,” Albanese said.The situation around Iran’s team comes at a tense moment for the country. Iran is currently facing military pressure from the United States and Israel, and the political climate has added to concerns for athletes who publicly show disagreement.Meanwhile, Iran has already announced it will not take part in this summer’s World Cup in North America.When asked about the situation last week by Politico, US President Donald Trump responded briefly, saying, “I really don’t care.”For now, Australian authorities say their focus remains on protecting the players who decided to stay.
Article Summary: Iranian state television called the players “wartime traitors,” which raised serious fears about what might happen to them if they returned home. Australia offered asylum to members of the team. Several players accepted the offer and chose to stay rather than fly back to Iran.

Article Title: “She slit her eye”: Darron Lee’s horrifying texts about injuries raise chilling questions in girlfriend’s brutal murder case
Article Text:
Darron Lee’s horrifying texts about injuries raise chilling questions in girlfriend’s brutal murder case.(Image via Getty Images, GoFundMe)

Darron Lee’s texts to ChatGPT is a dark reminder of what happened to his girlfriend before she passed away

Darron Lee, once a promising player of the New York Jets, is now a murder suspect after his girlfriend, Gabriella Carvalho Perpetuo, was found brutally murdered at the home they rented together in Tennessee last month.While Darron Lee faces a first degree murder charge, at a preliminary hearing in Hamilton Court, horrifying details of what actually happened have been released.Prosecutors at the preliminary hearing in Hamilton Court alleged that Darron Lee consulted ChatGPT if certain injuries can resemble wounds from a fall.To make matters worse, Darron Lee involved a fictional woman named “Allie” and accused his girlfriend, Gabriella Carvalho Perpetuo, of injuring herself through self inflicted wounds.In a text exchange with ChatGPT, Darron Lee wrote, “Fiancée did her crazy thing again and now she’s messed up, I wake up and she has two swollen eyes (I didn’t do anything, self inflicted) she stabbed herself, silt her eye? Idk but she isn’t waking up or responding, what do I do?”The former New York Jets player added, “Allie what should I tell my friend to handle someone non responsive but wants to call the police”As ChatGPT responded with a, “Okay-but this **serious but you can (covered up text) protect everyone**.Here’s exactly what to tell your friend, step-by step…”, Darron Lee replied, “doesn’t want to”.When authorities arrived at their rented home, Darron Lee allegedly lied about his girlfriend tripping in the shower and sustaining serious injuries.However, detectives were quick to notice that their rented home had blood all over the place and many of the injuries on Gabriella Carvalho Perpetuo’s body seemed brutal and could not be justified by a fall in the shower.This led to Darron Lee being immediately arrested by police as he now faces a first degree murder charge.As per reports, experts have predicted that there is a chance that the former New York Jets player might face the death penalty, considering the brutal nature of the crime.However, nothing has been confirmed yet as Darron Lee remains in prison.At this point in time, it is not known what led to Gabriella Carvalho Perpetuo’s brutal murder even though other women had accused Darron Lee of domestic violence before.Just 10 days before Gabriella Carvalho Perpetuo was found murdered, Darron Lee and she had moved into the rented home.
Article Summary: Former New York Jets player Darron Lee is now a murder suspect after his girlfriend, Gabriella Carvalho Perpetuo, was found brutally murdered at the home they rented together in Tennessee last month. The Tampa Bay Lightning winger picked up an assist against the Columbus Blue Jackets that gave him eight points over his last three games, pushing him to 104 points on the season.He has earned 31 points in 14 games in January and has totaled 53 points in 24 games since the start of the New Year.Meanwhile, Kucherov has already registered two Stanley Cup victories with the Lightning in 2020 and 2021, and bagged multiple awards like the Hart Award, Ted Lindsay Award, and the Art Ross Trophy as the league’s leading scorer. With his successful career running over the years, the Tampa Bay right winger has amassed huge wealth and fortune by playing for the team and the league.Let’s take a look at his career earnings, contract details, salary, and more in 2026.According to Sportskeeda, Nikita Kucherov’s total NHL career earnings have surpassed $85 million, with an annual mean salary of $9.5 million from his long-term Tampa Bay Lightning contract. As per reports, his net worth is estimated to be around $15 to $25 million in 2026.For the 2024-25 season, he will receive a base salary of $5 million along with a $4 million signing bonus, as reported by Sportskeeda. In 2025-26, Kucherov will earn a base salary of $5,000,000 and a signing bonus of $3,000,000, while carrying a cap hit of $9,500,000. Kucherov will become a free agent in 2027.Regarding his contract details, Nikita Kucherov has signed an 8-year, $76 million contract with the Tampa Bay Lightning from 2019-2025, including a $44,500,000 signing bonus, $76 million guaranteed, and an average annual salary of $9.5 million. Article Title: Tarik Skubal’s possible final Team USA start sparks emotional reactions as Bryce Harper and Paul Skenes deliver heartfelt messages
Article Text:
Tarik Skubal, Bryce Harper and Paul Skenes (Image Via Getty)

Bryce Harper and Paul Skenes praise Tarik Skubal as pitcher weighs difficult decision about staying with Team USA





The clubhouse at the World Baseball Classic often brings out strong emotions. That was clear when Tarik Skubal stepped onto the mound for Team USA against Great Britain at Daikin Park in Houston. The Detroit Tigers star was expected to make only one appearance in the tournament, but the moment quickly turned into something much bigger. After the game, teammates Bryce Harper and Paul Skenes shared emotional messages about his decision to play.Skubal delivered a solid outing despite giving up a leadoff home run to Nate Eaton on the first pitch. He settled down quickly and pitched three innings, allowing just one run on two hits with one walk and five strikeouts.Team USA went on to win the game 9–1. Still, the biggest story after the game was not just the win. It was the respect Skubal earned from his teammates as he balances national pride with a huge contract year ahead.Paul Skenes explained why Skubal’s decision to join the team meant so much inside the clubhouse. The young ace said the tournament is about more than individual careers.Skenes said, “If this game were just about Tarik, he’s sitting in Lakeland right now watching the WBC.But it’s not about him. It’s not about me. It’s not about any of us. It’s a whole lot bigger than us. I’m glad he answered the call.”Bryce Harper also spoke with deep respect about the situation. The Phillies first baseman pointed out that Skubal is risking a huge future payday just by stepping on the field.Harper said, “For Skubes to come out here and do what he does and pitch us one game, I have the most respect for pitchers who come in and do it, because everybody knows he is going to get absolutely broken off next year, and he’s going to make more money than anybody as a starting pitcher. For him to be able to do that and do it for us is something I respect out of him.”The risk Harper mentioned is real. Skubal is entering the final year of arbitration with the Detroit Tigers. If he stays healthy this season, many around baseball believe he could land one of the biggest contracts ever given to a pitcher. Still, the experience of playing for Team USA has clearly made an impact on him.After the game, Skubal admitted that leaving the tournament will not be an easy decision. He said, “Team USA totally gets what is going on with my situation. It’s unique. I’ve had these discussions with people, and most of them are extremely supportive of me being here in the first place.”He also added, “I want to play, but there’s a lot of stuff that factors in for this type of decision.” According to Ken Rosenthal of The Athletic, Skubal discussed the situation with Tigers management and his agent, Scott Boras, after the game.For now, the original plan still stands. Skubal was expected to make just one appearance before returning to Detroit’s spring training camp in Lakeland. But after experiencing the energy of the World Baseball Classic, walking away from the team may be harder than he first expected.
Article Summary: Detroit Tigers pitcher Tarik Skubal was expected to make only one appearance in the tournament. SkubAl pitched three innings, allowing just one run on two hits with one walk and five strikeouts. After the game, teammates Bryce Harper and Paul Skenes shared emotional messages.

Dak Prescott, the Dallas Cowboys’ star player, and his ex fiancée, Sarah Jane Ramos, have canceled their Italian wedding, just a month before they were set to take their vows.This devastating news comes at a time when fans were rooting for their future together. Though Dak Prescott has now been accused of cheating on Sarah Jane Ramos, it seems this was not a new issue in their high profile relationship.A few hours ago, as per Page Six, a source has revealed that the Dallas Cowboys’ star player, Dak Prescott, has had a “history” of speaking to multiple women and it happened before too.It seems Sarah Jane Ramos “stayed” through all the infidelity since she believed that he would go back to being a normal family man for their two young daughters, Margaret and Aurora.Unfortunately, as luck would have it, as per reports, Dak Prescott was caught messaging multiple women while they were hosting their joint bachelor and bachelorette parties in the Bahamas with their close friends.This reportedly resulted in a nasty fight between the two when Sarah Jane Ramos decided to cancel their lavish Lake Como wedding which was all set to be held on 10th April.However, neither Dak Prescott nor his ex fiancée, Sarah Jane Ramos, has responded to the speculations about the Dallas Cowboys’ star player’s alleged infidelity as they remain silent about their dramatic break up.The cheating rumors come at a time when it was reported that Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos pulled the plug on their wedding because she refused to sign the prenuptial agreement that he had proposed.But two days ago, Sarah Jane Ramos strongly denied such rumors as she wrote, “This had nothing to do with a prenup. I hope we can put that rumor to rest now.”Though Sarah Jane Ramos slammed all the prenup rumors, she stayed away from commenting on the actual reason behind canceling their Lake Como wedding, just a month prior.At this point in time, all eyes are on Dak Prescott as millions of fans are waiting for him to break his silence on his canceled wedding.Shockingly, the Dallas Cowboys’ star player has stayed away from commenting anything on his split with Sarah Jane Ramos.

Article Title: What is Clavicular’s Mog World Order? Date, time, Miami penthouse venue and Kick subathon details explored
Article Text:
Clavicular’s Mog (Image Via Getty)

Braden Clavicular reveals details about Mog World Order subathon and Miami penthouse livestream setup





Kick streamer Braden Clavicular is preparing for one of the longest livestream events of his career. On March 10, 2026, the 20 year old creator shared a trailer on X announcing his upcoming “Mog World Order” subathon. According to the announcement, the livestream will run for 30 days without stopping, beginning on March 12 at 5 p.m. EST. The event will take place inside a rented penthouse apartment in Miami, where he plans to broadcast his daily routines and interact with viewers around the clock.The event will be streamed on his official channel on Kick. In the video posted on X, Clavicular explained what viewers can expect during the month long broadcast.He said the stream will include workout sessions, personal grooming routines, and conversations about his lifestyle and appearance focused content. The announcement quickly caught attention online because of the unusual concept and the long streaming schedule planned for the event.In the trailer posted on X, Clavicular introduced himself and explained the idea behind the event. Speaking directly to viewers, he said:“I live in a luxury condominium in downtown Miami, the penthouse.My name is Clavicular. I am 20 years old. I believe in looksmaxxing, the idea of maximizing physical attractiveness by any means necessary in order to ascend.”He also described some of the routines he follows in his daily life. Clavicular said: “In the morning, if my jaw looks a little weak, I will bone smash to strengthen it. My ratios are nearly golden now.”During the same video, he mentioned several products and supplements he uses as part of his personal routine. He explained that he focuses on muscle growth, skin health, and hair maintenance while trying to improve his overall appearance. Clavicular ended the trailer by announcing the start of the livestream event. He said:“When it comes to ascension, if you are not looksmaxxing, you are not lifemaxing. And if you are not lifemaxing, you are nothing. The wait is over. March 13, Mog World Order begins. Thirty days, twenty four seven live on Kick. Welcome to the new era.”Ahead of the subathon, Clavicular also showed viewers the Miami penthouse during a Kick livestream on March 10 titled “DESKTOP AT THE CRIB! JOIN UP !stake.” In the stream, he walked through the large apartment and reacted to its size.While exploring the property, he said the house might actually be bigger than he needs for the event. Clavicular explained that he does not have many belongings and only requires a small amount of space for the streaming setup.During the same broadcast, he also spoke briefly about a medical procedure he previously discussed online. According to Clavicular, a $35,000 jaw surgery could require weeks of recovery, but he believes it could slightly improve his appearance. For now, fans are waiting to see how the Mog World Order subathon unfolds once the livestream begins this week.
Article Summary: Kick streamer Braden Clavicular is preparing for one of the longest livestream events of his career. On March 10, 2026, the 20 year old creator shared a trailer on X announcing his upcoming “Mog World Order” subathon. According to the announcement, the livestream will run for 30 days without stopping, beginning on March 12 at 5 p.m. EST. The event will take place inside a rented penthouse apartment in Miami.

Article Title: Novak Djokovic joins Giannis Antetokounmpo and Kevin Durant reacting to Bam Adebayo’s shocking 83 point Miami Heat game past Kobe Bryant
Article Text:
Novak Djokovic joins Giannis Antetokounmpo and Kevin Durant reacting to Bam Adebayo’s shocking 83 point Miami Heat game past Kobe Bryant (Image via Getty)

Novak Djokovic joins Erik Spoelstra, Giannis Antetokounmpo and Kevin Durant in reacting to Bam Adebayo’s 83 point game that passed Kobe Bryant





Novak Djokovic reacted with excitement after Miami Heat star Bam Adebayo delivered a huge night in the NBA, scoring 83 points against the Washington Wizards. The massive performance helped the Miami Heat win 150–129 and pushed Adebayo past Kobe Bryant’s famous 81-point game, placing him second on the list of highest single-game scoring performances behind Wilt Chamberlain’s 100 points. Many well-known basketball names quickly shared their thoughts after the game. Miami Heat head coach Erik Spoelstra, Washington Wizards head coach Brian Keefe, Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo, and NBA forward Kevin Durant all reacted to the historic moment.Tennis legend Novak Djokovic also joined the celebration. The 24-time Grand Slam champion shared a photo of Adebayo on his Instagram Stories and congratulated him on the historic night.Djokovic wrote: “History!! Congrats 🙌💪👏.”Adebayo’s scoring night quickly became one of the biggest talking points in the sports world, drawing reactions not just from basketball but from athletes across different sports.After the game, Miami Heat coach Erik Spoelstra explained how special the performance felt from the bench.He said:“I didn’t dare even think about taking him out.”Washington Wizards coach Brian Keefe admitted the game changed once Adebayo caught fire late.Keefe said:“In the fourth quarter it turned into not a real basketball game.”Milwaukee Bucks superstar Giannis Antetokounmpo also shared a strong message about why the number itself will always be remembered.Antetokounmpo said:“It doesn’t matter how you get there. Like 30 years from now, nobody’s going to remember how many free throws he shot. I don’t think I remember how many shots Kobe had or how many free throws he made or 3s. All you remember is 81. Wilt, 100. So at the end of the day, he got 83 points.”NBA star Kevin Durant also reacted after seeing the numbers from the game.Durant said:“I couldn’t believe it when I was hearing it in real time. Congratulations to Bam. I looked at his stats, it’s pretty crazy. 40 shots, 40 free throws, 20 3s. To pass Kobe as the second highest scorer in the history of the game, congrats to him. Something we’ll talk about forever.”Djokovic’s reaction also reminded many fans of his connection to Kobe Bryant.When Djokovic won the 2023 US Open, he paid tribute to Bryant by wearing a special shirt honoring the NBA legend’s famous “Mamba mentality.”Speaking to Sky Sports after that win, Djokovic opened up about their friendship.Djokovic said:“Kobe was a close friend. We chatted a lot about the winner’s mentality when I was struggling with injury and trying to make my comeback and work my way back to the top of the game. He was one of the people that I relied on the most. He was always there for any kind of counsel, advice and support in the most friendly way.”Right now, Novak Djokovic is competing at the BNP Paribas Open in Indian Wells, where he is set to face Jack Draper in the fourth round.
Article Summary: Miami Heat star Bam Adebayo scored 83 points against the Washington Wizards. The massive performance helped the Miami Heat win 150–129. It pushed him past Kobe Bryant's famous 81-point game, placing him second on the list of highest single- game scoring performances behind Wilt Chamberlain’s 100 points.

Article Text:

England 2 (Grace Balsdon, Holly Hunt) bt Austria 0.
