Scotland 3 (Katherine Holdgate 2, Jennifer Eadie) bt Uruguay 1 (Teresa Vianna).

SFs line-up:

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph





HYDERABAD: Indian camp was ecstatic after sealing a World Cup berth with a 4-1 win over Wales in the final Pool B match of FIH women’s World Cup qualifiers at Gachibowli stadium on Wednesday. India also sealed top spot in the pool and a semifinal berth, but more importantly they can focus on the World Cup in Belgium and Netherlands later this year.While the top three teams from the tournament get a direct entry to the World Cup, the fourth spot will go to the highest ranked team. With England, the highest ranked team likely to finish in the top three, India, with the second best ranking, are assured of a berth even if they don’t finish in top three. India’s Navneet Kaur, who scored a hat-trick on Wednesday, however, was keen to win the tournament.India vs Italy; England vs Scotland.
Article Summary: India sealed a World Cup berth with a 4-1 win over Wales in the final Pool B match of FIH women’s World Cup qualifiers at Gachibowli stadium on Wednesday. India also sealed top spot in the pool and a semifinal berth, but more importantly they can focus on the World Cup in Belgium and Netherlands later this year.

Article Title: “Ready when you are”: Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift’s wedding buzz grows as Empire State Building makes venue pitch
Article Text:
The Empire State Building joined the buzz around Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce by playfully suggesting it could host their future wedding. The iconic skyscraper posted a viral social media video inviting the couple to choose it as their venue, adding to the growing fan excitement surrounding their high-profile relationship.

Empire State Building makes playful pitch to host Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding





The internet loves a grand romance, and the Empire State Building just decided to join the conversation. In a lighthearted social media moment that quickly caught fans’ attention, the iconic New York landmark put forward its own bold suggestion for the most talked-about celebrity wedding of the moment. If global superstar Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce ever decide to tie the knot, the building wants to be more than just a scenic backdrop. It wants to host the entire celebration.The playful pitch arrived through a short video posted by the building’s official account, filmed inside its famous Art Deco lobby. Standing beneath the glowing mural of the skyscraper, a staff member spread his arms wide and delivered a tongue-in-cheek proposal aimed directly at the celebrity couple.The caption across the clip read, “Our formal application to be Taylor and Travis’ wedding venue.” It was a simple line, but it sparked plenty of excitement among fans already invested in the couple’s high-profile relationship.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.The clip quickly gained traction online as fans shared the moment across social media. The Empire State Building did not stop with just the on-screen message either. In the caption accompanying the video, the account added another playful note directed at Swift, writing, “Ready when you are @taylorswift …”For many viewers, the suggestion felt perfectly on brand for the famous skyscraper.After all, the Empire State Building has long been tied to romance in popular culture. It has appeared in classic love stories, films, and countless marriage proposals over the decades. That history makes the building an easy symbol for a grand romantic gesture.Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s relationship has already created a similar kind of pop-culture moment. Since the singer began appearing at Kansas City Chiefs games, their romance has become one of the most discussed celebrity stories in both music and sports circles. Fans keep track of their public appearances, look at every detail, and celebrate the rare time when the NFL and the music industry work together.That intense interest helps explain why even a playful video from a historic landmark can ignite conversation. For Swifties and football fans alike, the idea of the Empire State Building hosting such a wedding feels almost cinematic.Whether the couple ever considers the offer remains unknown. For now, the building’s proposal stands as a charming reminder of just how much attention the Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce romance continues to capture. And if the day ever comes, New York’s most famous skyscraper has already made its case.
Article Summary: Empire State Building makes playful pitch to host Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding. The iconic New York landmark put forward its own bold suggestion for the most talked-about celebrity wedding of the moment. The playful pitch arrived through a short video posted by the building's official account, filmed inside its famous Art Deco lobby.
